/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/camera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/camera_detection_interfaces/srv/detail/detect_pipe__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/caleb/Documents/robot_ws/build/camera_detection_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
